title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its first publicly available Mythos-class AI model with capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The model includes safety systems that limit capabilities in high-risk domains like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry to control potential misuse.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as the company's first publicly available Mythos-class model. It spans capabilities across software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The key point is that the model ships with safety systems that restrict capabilities in high-risk domains, specifically cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry, as a control against potential misuse.
